zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen于1410年出生时，他的父亲Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen61岁，母亲Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth40岁。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Dussen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from a nickname from Middle Dutch musch, modern Dutch mus ‘house sparrow’.
English: variant of   Musson  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Musson
meanings: English (East Midlands): nickname from Anglo-Norman French mussun, muisson ‘sparrow’.
English: variant of Muston with loss of -t-. The placename Muston (Leicestershire) is recorded as Musson several times in the 17th century.

French: habitational name from (Le) Musson, the name of a few places in various parts of France, e.g. in Meuse-et-Moselle, named with the Latin personal name Montius + the suffix -onem, or, alternatively, with Latin mons ‘mountain’ + the suffix -ionem.

nameMeanings.name: Arnoud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Arnold .

nameMeanings.name: Arnoud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Arnold .

nameMeanings.name: Floris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name derived from Latin flos, genitive floris ‘flower’.
Italian (Sardinia): plural form of   Flore  .
Greek: derivative of Floros , or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name, such as Florakis.

variants.name: Flore
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen was born in 1410, his father, Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen, was 61 and his mother, Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth, was 40. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen est né en 1410, son père, Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen 1410 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen 61 und seine Mutter Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth 40. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen è nato il nel 1410, il suo padre, Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussenが1410年に生まれた時，父Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussenは61歳，母Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorthは40歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen(이)가 1410년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth(은)는 40세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen nasceu em 1410, seu pai, Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen родился в 1410 г., его отцу по имени Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arnoud Arnoud Floris van der Dussen nació en 1410, su papá, Arnoud Floris Jan van der Dussen, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Hadewig Jan Heimerik (Ss) (HELWIG) van Mol van Dorth, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
